description_text: Product Description 2Pcs Carbon Fiber Style Universal Car Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser Splitter Canard Protector Description: 100% Brand New and High Quality Make your car more aggressive Highly recommended professional installation Comes with 2 rear lip wraps Please measure your back lip wrap angle and make sure these spoilers fit Custom fit for most vehicles, products may need to be drilled and bolted to the bumper Please Measure Your Car Rear Bumper Angle And Make Sure These Splitters will Fit Your Vehicle. Specification: Material: ABS Color: Glossy Carbon Fiber Size: As picture Package Contents: 1 pair of rear bumper + Some screws Payment Returns Contact Us Shipping We accept payment by PayPal only ! Payment should be completed within 5 days after buyer places the order,or else an unpaid case will be opened in order to cancel the transaction. If you can not pay in time, please contact us. e-check from PayPal will only be processed once the payment clears. All of the items will be shipped to buyer's EBAY address,please confirm your address on Ebay before you buy.Your order will be usually shipped out the same or next business days once the payment is made and cleared. Welcome to our Store ~
